title: theta_pi_pestpg_v1 — ANGSD thetaStat per-window pestPG row
description: One row per non-overlapping (or sliding) window emitted by `thetaStat do_stat`. The on-disk format is a tab-separated text file with a comment header line starting with '#(indexStart' (skipped by the extractor) followed by columns: Chr, WinCenter, tW, tP, tF, tH, tL, Tajima, fuf, fud, fayh, zeng, nSites. Per-site θπ for the window is computed downstream as tP / nSites (NOT in this schema — the schema preserves the raw column shape). The pipeline emits four scales: win5000.step1000, win10000.step2000, win50000.step10000, win500000.step500000 (the last being non-overlapping 500 kb). 226 samples × 4 scales = 904 files.

Chr.description: Chromosome label as emitted by ANGSD (matches the reference FASTA header). Example: 'C_gar_LG01'.

WinCenter.description: Window center position in base pairs (1-based reference coordinates). For a window [start, end], WinCenter = (start + end) / 2.

tW.description: Sum of per-site Watterson's θ_W over the window (NOT a density — divide by nSites for per-site rate).

tP.description: Sum of per-site pairwise θ_π over the window. Per-site θπ = tP / nSites when nSites > 0.

tF.description: Sum of θ_F (Fu & Li's F-based estimator) over the window.

tH.description: Sum of Fay & Wu's θ_H over the window.

tL.description: Sum of Zeng's θ_L over the window.

Tajima.description: Tajima's D for the window. null when nSites is too small to compute the variance (ANGSD emits 0 or NaN; the extractor coerces NaN/empty/'.' → null).

fuf.description: Fu & Li's F* statistic (with outgroup). null when not computable.

fud.description: Fu & Li's D* statistic (with outgroup). null when not computable.

fayh.description: Fay & Wu's H statistic (with outgroup). null when not computable.

zeng.description: Zeng's E statistic (with outgroup). null when not computable.

nSites.description: Number of callable sites in the window. Denominator for per-site rates. nSites=0 means the window had no data and per-site θ is undefined.

_provenance.angsd_args: thetaStat do_stat -type 2 (physical, anchored to chromosome start) -win <win_bp> -step <step_bp>
_provenance._arg: Each .pestPG has an optional sibling .pestPG.arg with the command-line (see samples_theta_pi_arg layer; currently disabled because not all are mirrored to E:).
